name: wb-save-chart
_note: Persists a chart spec to the per-user in-memory permalink store (globalThis._concordSTATE.societyCharts) and returns a shareable id + permalink. STATE-backed via the internal owner actor. A missing spec fails-closed with 'spec object required'; the V2 deep-nested object IS a valid spec, so it returns ok:true with a real id. NEVER no_db.
